name: Chocolate Eggnog Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Swiss chocolate cake mix (without pudding), 18 oz
2 packages Inst. vanilla pudding & pie mix, 3-1/2 oz each
recipeInstructions:
FOR CAKE:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine cake mix, eggs, eggnog, oil, pudding mix, and nutmeg. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes. Grease a 12-cup bundt pan and pour batter into the pan. Bake for 60-65 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 20 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely. Frost with Eggnog Butter Cream Frosting.
Eggnog Butter Cream Frosting:
In a medium saucepan, bring eggnog and nutmeg to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the eggnog is reduced to 1/2 cup, about 30 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool completely. In a medium bowl, combine reduced eggnog, butter, and powdered sugar. Beat with an electric mixer on high speed until light and fluffy. Use immediately to frost the cooled cake.
